meta.description: Floret flower studio in Poltava — bouquets, decor, wedding florals.

home.heroTagline: We create bouquets you’ll love to give and receive
home.aboutBody:
FLORET was founded in 2015 in the heart of Poltava.

Since then, we’ve been making bouquets for special moments — with attention to detail and a distinctive style.

We’re about beauty, refinement, and an approach that isn’t ordinary. That’s why people trust us.

Who gives — and receives — our bouquets?

They’re chosen by open-minded, refined people who love what’s beautiful and unusual. Our clients aren’t afraid to give feedback.

We’re lucky that in most cases our bouquets reach kindred spirits. So the FLORET workshop is about flowers — and about friendship.
home.teamBioTanya: Owner, florist, and your express courier. She always looks out for your bouquets and doesn’t trust taxi drivers. And yes — she can stir things up a little even in the calmest situations.
home.teamBioZhenya: She sets the trends for our bouquets. She builds unconventional, thoughtful compositions with real taste. One more thing: a total bookworm — 30 books a month is normal (where she finds time to read them is still an open question).
home.teamBioYana: Our dreamy introvert with a very fine sense of style. She creates refined, aesthetic bouquets. And if you ever lost someone fluffy on the street — chances are Yana has already taken care of them.
home.featuredSubtitle: Flower selection may vary with season and availability while keeping the chosen style and mood.
home.editorialBody: We style venues, events, and other spaces. Have a custom project in mind? Leave a request — we’ll get in touch to discuss the details with you.
home.decorFormSuccess: Thank you! We’ll contact you shortly.
home.decorFormError: Could not send. Please try again or message us on Instagram.
home.ctaStrip: Ready to make the day special? Leave an order — we’ll call back to confirm.
home.gallerySubtitle: A glimpse of our mood and composition — stems may vary with the season.

wedding.metaDescription: Custom wedding bouquets and venue florals in Poltava. Send a request — we’ll discuss details and budget.
wedding.title: Wedding florals
wedding.intro: We create the bride’s bouquet as well as floral decor for the ceremony and reception to your brief. Share your wishes, approximate budget, and event date — we’ll get in touch to align every detail.
wedding.formSuccess: Thank you! We’ll contact you shortly.
wedding.formError: Could not send. Please try again or message us on Instagram.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.styleDisclaimer: Flower selection may vary with season and availability while keeping the chosen style and mood.
catalog.colorMoodHint: Same labels as in the product editor (pink, blue, yellow, red, white, bright).

product.styleNote: Stems may change with season and availability. We’ll build the arrangement in the same mood and style as in the photo.

order.title: Order
order.priceFloorHint: Minimum amount for this size is {min}.
order.agreedAmountHint: Suggested amount for the selected bouquet size. You may change it if you want a larger or smaller composition.
order.pickupAddressHint: Studio address is on the Contacts page. Choose a pickup day and an approximate one-hour window — timing may shift slightly depending on studio workload.
order.pickupDateRangeHint: You can choose today and the next six days.
order.pickupTimeHint: Approximate one-hour slot at the studio — we aim for your window but timing may shift slightly.
order.totalPendingQuoteHint: Choose a delivery zone (and time window if needed) to see the total with delivery.
order.prepayBouquetOnlyNote: With “confirm address with recipient”, only the bouquet is charged now. We’ll agree the delivery fee separately once the address is known.
order.pickupDateInvalid: That pickup date is not available. Choose a day within the next week.
order.invalidDeliveryDistrict: Could not calculate delivery for this area and time. Refresh the page and try again.
order.deliveryNamedZoneRequired: Please choose a delivery zone from the list.
order.invalidDeliveryNamedZone: That delivery zone could not be confirmed. Refresh and try again.
order.deliveryZoneCardsHint: Pick a zone — the delivery line and total update as soon as you choose.
order.coordinateAddressLabel: I don’t know the full address — please confirm it with the recipient
order.coordinateAddressHelp: We’ll contact the recipient for the address. For immediate online payment, only the bouquet amount is charged; delivery is settled after the address is known.
order.deliveryTimeApproxHint: Approximate window — the courier may arrive earlier or slightly later.
order.deliveryPricingNote: We confirm the final fee after the address is clear (taxi rates may vary).
order.deliveryTierHint: Pick the option that matches the distance from our studio to the address, then enter the full address below.
order.deliveryTierRequired: Please choose a delivery distance zone so we can calculate the delivery fee.
order.invalidDeliveryTier: That delivery zone could not be confirmed. Refresh the page and choose again.
order.dateFormatHint: Pick a date from the calendar (how it looks depends on your browser).
order.deliverySameDayRules: Same-day delivery orders are accepted until {orderCutoff}; delivery that day runs until {deliveryEnd}.
order.addressAutocompleteHint: Suggestions are limited to Poltava Oblast (Google). You can type the full address manually.
order.addressManualFallback: Suggestions unavailable — enter the full address (street, building, city).
order.preferMessengerContact: Do not call — message me on Viber, WhatsApp, or Telegram
order.privacy: I agree to the processing of personal data to place this order.
order.sameDayOrderClosed: We’re no longer accepting same-day delivery orders for today. Choose another date or pickup.

about.title: Our story
about.body: Floret is a flower studio in Poltava. We work with fresh flowers and create arrangements for every day and special occasions.

delivery.metaDescription: Delivery fees and terms in Poltava and nearby areas.
delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.free: Free delivery from UAH 4,000 (9:00–19:00 within the city of Poltava).
delivery.cityIntro: Delivery within Poltava in a roughly one-hour window (7:00–20:00):
delivery.outsideRow3: Hozhuly, Rybtsi, Rozsoshyntsi, Horbanivka, Shcherbani, Suprunivka, N. Mlyny — UAH 250–350
delivery.note1: If your address isn’t listed, ask for a quote by phone or Viber / Telegram: 066 278 9828.
delivery.note3: Other routes outside the city are priced individually.
delivery.note4: Morning delivery slots are booked until 18:30.
delivery.note5: Orders accepted after 19:00 are processed the next day.
delivery.note6: On regular days, delivery is within 2 hours after payment.
delivery.note7: On peak holidays (14 Feb, 8 Mar, Mother’s Day), delivery windows may be 1–3 hours due to high demand.

legal.metaDescription: Payee details, refunds, delivery and pickup.
legal.title: Customer information
legal.deliveryIntro: For full tariffs and terms, see
legal.payeeBody:
Payee: FOP Chornous Tetiiana Borysivna
RNOKPP: 2829117167
Registered address: 14 Volodymyra Kozaka St., Poltava, 36003, Ukraine
Phone: +380 66 278 9828
Pickup: 25 B Sobornosti St., Poltava, Poltava Oblast, 36010, Ukraine
legal.refundBody:
Floral products and services are made to your individual order; goods are perishable. After an order is confirmed and/or paid, we do not offer voluntary refunds (including if you change your mind), except where required by the laws of Ukraine.

If the law applies or we cannot fulfil the order due to our fault, contact us at +380 66 278 9828 or Instagram @floret_poltava — we will review your request and respond within a reasonable time.

privacy.metaDescription: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.introBody: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains how Floret Poltava (“we”) processes personal data of website visitors and clients. If you have questions, contact us by phone or Instagram @floret_poltava.
privacy.collectionTitle: Collection and use of personal data
privacy.collectionBody:
Personal data means information that identifies you or can be linked to you.

We may ask for data when you place an order, submit a request, or contact us.

Examples: name, phone, delivery address, order notes, delivery date and time, preferred contact channel (Viber, Telegram, call). We only collect email if you provide it.

We use this data to fulfil your order, contact you about it, notify you of important changes, and improve our service (internal use only, not sold for third-party marketing).

If you take part in promotions we run, your data may be used to operate those promotions.
privacy.disclosureBody:
We do not sell your data to third parties for their marketing.

Exceptions: where disclosure is required by the laws of Ukraine, a court order in Ukraine, or a lawful request from a Ukrainian public authority; or where we reasonably believe disclosure is necessary for safety, law enforcement, or protecting rights.

In case of reorganisation or transfer of business, data may be passed to a successor under Ukrainian law.
privacy.securityBody:
We take organisational and technical measures to protect personal data against loss, unauthorised access, alteration, or destruction.

Staff with access to client data are informed of confidentiality requirements.
privacy.companyBody: The studio responsible for processing personal data on this site and when you order is Floret Poltava — see the Contact page for details.

errors.paymentFailed: Payment was not completed. Try again or choose reservation.
